## Checklist

- [ ] `./scripts/check-all.sh` passes locally.
- [ ] CLA signed (individual or corporate) — CLA Assistant will confirm on the PR.
- [ ] SPDX header on every new file.
- [ ] `STATUS.md` updated if crate maturity changed.
- [ ] `TASKS.md` updated: task marked done or new follow-ups added.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `[Unreleased]` if user-visible.
- [ ] ADR added or updated if this decision has cross-release impact.
- [ ] No new dependencies with non-allow-listed licences (`cargo deny check`).
